testcase.name: WorkPlan

error.message: 'POST /elements' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [34bca9e7-979e-4638-82f1-512d2e551fa7, findElements {using=xpath, value=//android.widget.ScrollView/android.view.View[1]/android.view.View[8]/android.widget.EditText}] Capabilities {appium:app: D:\Hercules - easySR\App Au..., appium:appActivity: com.sslwireless.dsas.ui.spl..., appium:appPackage: com.sslwireless.dsas, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:databaseEnabled: false, appium:desired: {app: D:\Hercules - easySR\App Au..., autoGrantPermissions: true, automationName: UiAutomator2, deviceName: SM_A266B, newCommandTimeout: 300, platformName: ANDROID, udid: R5CY542ZHDE}, appium:deviceApiLevel: 36, appium:deviceManufacturer: samsung, appium:deviceModel: SM-A266B, appium:deviceName: R5CY542ZHDE, appium:deviceScreenDensity: 450, appium:deviceScreenSize: 1080x2340, appium:deviceUDID: R5CY542ZHDE, appium:javascriptEnabled: true, appium:locationContextEnabled: false, appium:networkConnectionEnabled: true, appium:newCommandTimeout: 300, appium:pixelRatio: 2.8125, appium:platformVersion: 16, appium:statBarHeight: 96, appium:takesScreenshot: true, appium:udid: R5CY542ZHDE, appium:viewportRect: {height: 2244, left: 0, top: 96, width: 1080}, appium:warnings: {}, appium:webStorageEnabled: false, platformName: ANDROID} Session ID: 34bca9e7-979e-4638-82f1-512d2e551fa7

testcase.name: tearDown

error.message:
Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\tahamidul.haque\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s R5CY542ZHDE shell 'settings delete global hidden_api_policy_pre_p_apps;settings delete global hidden_api_policy_p_apps;settings delete global hidden_api_policy'' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb.exe: device 'R5CY542ZHDE' not found
Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [34bca9e7-979e-4638-82f1-512d2e551fa7, quit {}] Capabilities {appium:app: D:\Hercules - easySR\App Au..., appium:appActivity: com.sslwireless.dsas.ui.spl..., appium:appPackage: com.sslwireless.dsas, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:databaseEnabled: false, appium:desired: {app: D:\Hercules - easySR\App Au..., autoGrantPermissions: true, automationName: UiAutomator2, deviceName: SM_A266B, newCommandTimeout: 300, platformName: ANDROID, udid: R5CY542ZHDE}, appium:deviceApiLevel: 36, appium:deviceManufacturer: samsung, appium:deviceModel: SM-A266B, appium:deviceName: R5CY542ZHDE, appium:deviceScreenDensity: 450, appium:deviceScreenSize: 1080x2340, appium:deviceUDID: R5CY542ZHDE, appium:javascriptEnabled: true, appium:locationContextEnabled: false, appium:networkConnectionEnabled: true, appium:newCommandTimeout: 300, appium:pixelRatio: 2.8125, appium:platformVersion: 16, appium:statBarHeight: 96, appium:takesScreenshot: true, appium:udid: R5CY542ZHDE, appium:viewportRect: {height: 2244, left: 0, top: 96, width: 1080}, appium:warnings: {}, appium:webStorageEnabled: false, platformName: ANDROID} Session ID: 34bca9e7-979e-4638-82f1-512d2e551fa7
